findings.title: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.actual_results:
Rule: color-contrast
Impact: serious
Occurrences: 28
Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
findings.incorrect_code: HexaShield Tested Investments Samco Flexi Cap Fund Help and Support Food for Thought Go to SamcoMF
findings.recommendation: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds | https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/color-contrast?application=axeAPI

any.message: Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.97 (foreground color: #dae7f4, background color: #4788c8, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

findings.title: Links must have discernible text
findings.actual_results:
Rule: link-name
Impact: serious
Occurrences: 2
Ensure links have discernible text
